corrected_fields.summary: This source is the Federal Reserve's official FOMC meeting calendar page, listing scheduled meeting dates for 2021-2027 along with links to historical statements, minutes, and press conference materials. It is a navigation/index page, not an archiveable policy document itself. No policy decisions, economic data, or substantive commentary are contained herein.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This is a utility reference page for locating FOMC policy documents. The actual archiveable content resides in the linked statements, minutes, and projection materials—not in this calendar index itself. Researchers should navigate to specific meeting documents for policy-relevant content.
